contentBlocks.original:
गोविन्देति सदा स्नानं गोविन्देति सदाजपं
गोविन्देति सदा ध्यानं सदा गोविन्द कीर्तनम्
contentBlocks.transliteration:
govindeti sadā snānaṃ govindeti sadājapaṃ
govindeti sadā dhyānaṃ sadā govinda kīrtanam
contentBlocks.translation: Always remember Govinda while bathing, always chant Govinda’s name, always meditate on Govinda, and always sing praises of Govinda.
contentBlocks.meanings: गोविन्देति (govindeti) – Govinda thus (govinda:Govinda | iti:thus); सदा (sadā) – always; स्नानं (snānaṃ) – bathing; गोविन्देति (govindeti) – Govinda thus (govinda:Govinda | iti:thus); सदाजपं (sadājapaṃ) – always chanting (sadā:always | japaṃ:chanting); गोविन्देति (govindeti) – Govinda thus (govinda:Govinda | iti:thus); सदा (sadā) – always; ध्यानं (dhyānaṃ) – meditation; सदा (sadā) – always; गोविन्द (govinda) – Govinda; कीर्तनम् (kīrtanam) – praise;
